title: Encode text with a single cipher in the playground
description: This verifies that a user can select one cipher, enter text, and receive transformed output in the playground.

steps.description: Fill in sample text to encode

title: Navigate from landing page to the cipher playground
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the landing page and reach the cipher playground to start an encoding or decoding task.

steps.description: Verify the landing page is displayed
Click the link to open the cipher playground
Verify the cipher playground is displayed

title: Decode text with a single cipher in the playground
description: This verifies that a user can decode text in the playground and see the recovered output.

steps.description: Fill in sample ciphertext to decode

title: View the landing page with its interactive hero experience
description: This verifies that the landing page renders its main promotional content and interactive hero experience on load.

steps.description: Verify the landing page hero content is displayed

title: Chain multiple ciphers in the playground
description: This verifies that a user can apply multiple cipher layers in sequence and see the combined transformed result.

steps.description: Fill in sample text to transform
Verify multi-layer transformed output is displayed

title: Open the scanner interface
description: A visitor can open the scanner page and see the scanning interface render successfully.

steps.description: Verify the scanner interface is displayed

title: Keep working from recent history in the dashboard
description: This verifies that a returning user can review recent activity and continue a prior cipher workflow from the dashboard.

steps.description: Open a recent activity item or quick action
Verify the continuation view is displayed

title: Decode text from an uploaded image
description: A user can provide an image to the scanner and receive decoded text in the interface.

steps.description: Provide a valid image containing encoded text

title: Complete a cipher lesson quiz
description: A learner can open a lesson, answer the quiz, and receive feedback on the result.

steps.description: Answer the quiz questions with valid responses

title: Review dashboard statistics and quick actions
description: This verifies that a user can open the dashboard and see activity statistics and available quick actions.

title: Open the learning hub
description: A visitor can open the learning hub and see the lesson browsing interface render successfully.

steps.description: Verify the learning hub content is displayed

title: See a fallback dashboard when activity data is unavailable
description: This verifies that the dashboard presents an empty or fallback state when there is no activity to show.

steps.description: Verify an empty or fallback dashboard state is displayed

title: See quiz validation guidance after an incomplete submission
description: A learner who submits an incomplete or invalid quiz response receives a validation prompt instead of a completed result.

steps.description: Submit the quiz without completing the required response
Verify a quiz validation prompt is displayed

title: Get guidance when no lesson is selected
description: A visitor navigating the learning hub without opening a lesson sees an instructional empty or guidance state.

steps.description: Verify a lesson-selection guidance state is displayed

title: See a usable landing page when animations are unavailable
description: This verifies that the landing page still presents a degraded but usable experience if decorative motion effects are not available.

steps.description: Verify the landing page is displayed
Verify the primary landing content remains usable

title: Attempt live camera decoding
description: A user can access the live camera scanning experience and see the current placeholder state for unfinished camera decoding.

steps.description: Verify a placeholder or not-yet-implemented state is displayed
